name: Acceptance of the monolithic frame in a bay
description: Монолитный каркас (колонны + перекрытия C30/37) in one bay. The geodetic обмер is the surveyed reference for the poured volume; the 28-day strength protocol and the acceptance inspection (АООК for responsible structures) back the decision. Technical supervision accepts on the surveyed m³; money at the frame rate unlocks the envelope in the bay. Per-bay scope.

evidence.description: Акт освидетельствования / АООК (ответственные конструкции) — acceptance inspection of the frame in the bay.
Протокол испытаний бетона 28 сут. — 28-day compressive strength for the grade.
Исполнительная геодезическая съёмка / обмер — surveyed poured volume (drives payment).

checks.description: Inspection, strength protocol and survey are attached.
The completed volume must be stated.
A valid per-bay zone id (e.g. A1-F03, A1-F91).
Claimed volume within 5% / 1 m³ of the surveyed value and within its uncertainty U.

consequences.description: Accepted frame volume becomes earned value.
Frame accepted — the envelope may start in this bay.
